summary: A short issue strip and question banner frame the page, while the recommendation board and a compact impact cluster complete the executive synthesis.
composition_pattern: issue strip, question banner, strategy board, impact cluster
support_structure: short issue strip or challenge row
strategy board with one or two central moves
compact impact cluster with headline metrics
when_to_use: The page must restate the challenge before it shows the answer.
The recommendation is strong but still needs explicit quantified impact on the same page.
avoid_when: The page needs three equally weighted strategy moves.
The context section is too long to fit into a short issue strip.
